description_long: This is a compact, open-top sports car with a vibrant red and orange color scheme, featuring the words 'JOY RIDE' prominently displayed on the windshield banner. The car has a rounded, retro-inspired body with exaggerated curves, circular headlights, and a set of four rally-style auxiliary lights mounted on the front bumper. Racing decals, including the number '08', are visible on the hood and doors, enhancing its sporty appearance. The interior is visible from the side, showing two bucket seats and a detailed dashboard with a central console and steering wheel. The rear of the car is equipped with a large black spoiler, dual exhaust pipes, and a license plate reading 'JOY RIDE', while the wheels have a multi-spoke alloy design.
description: A compact, retro-styled red and orange sports car with racing decals, an open top, and a large rear spoiler. Features include rally lights, multi-spoke alloy wheels, and a detailed visible interior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded nose, four rally lights, circular headlights, 'JOY RIDE' windshield banner, and racing number '08' on the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open-top design, visible interior with two seats, racing number '08' on the door, and the large rear spoiler.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the dual exhaust pipes, rear license plate 'JOY RIDE', dashboard and steering wheel, and the rear spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open cabin, racing number '08', and the multi-spoke wheels with the spoiler visible at the back.
